title: bioimage.io upload: modest-octopus
author: Qin Yu
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
View on bioimage.io  # StarDist Plant Nuclei 3D ResNet  
 This is a  StarDist  model (or a  CSBDeep  model) for segmenting plant nuclei in 3D images. Trained by Qin Yu from Kreshuk Lab at EMBL with training datasets from Schneitz Lab at TUM. A PlantSeg (or pytorch-3dunet) model is also available on Bioimage.IO at https://bioimage.io/#/?id=10.5281%2Fzenodo.8401064
steps_raw:
View on bioimage.io  # StarDist Plant Nuclei 3D ResNet  
 This is a  StarDist  model (or a  CSBDeep  model) for segmenting plant nuclei in 3D images. Trained by Qin Yu from Kreshuk Lab at EMBL with training datasets from Schneitz Lab at TUM. A PlantSeg (or pytorch-3dunet) model is also available on Bioimage.IO at https://bioimage.io/#/?id=10.5281%2Fzenodo.8401064
